sglang.author: Ratish1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
 Fixes #21805.   SGLang already supports Qwen3.5 multimodal models in the runtime, but encoder disaggregation rejected them during servervstartup. This blocked valid EPD deployments for Qwen3.5 models even though the underlying model and multimodal processorvsupport were already present.

In _draft_extend_for_decode the hidden states need to be updated after every draft step

sglang.title: [Diffusion] Replace Conv3d with reshape + F.linear in PatchEmbed
sglang.author: AichenF
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For 5D video inputs, PatchEmbed uses nn.Conv3d with kernel_size == stride (non-overlapping patches). Under the hood, PyTorch's Conv3d emits three separate CUDA kernels:

aten::fill — zeros the output buffer
aten::copy — performs im2col rearrangement
GEMM — the actual matrix multiply

Sinc

sglang.title: Move hash utils out of hicache_storage to break CUDA import chain
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
radix_cache.py imports get_hash_str / hash_str_to_int64 from hicache_storage.py, which pulls in memory_pool_host → sgl_kernel → libcuda.so.1. This makes io_struct.py (via schedule_batch → radix_cache) unimportable on CPU-only machines, blocking unit tests that need http_server endpoints.

sglang.title: [Spec][Ngram] Support multiple SAMs with dynamic HTTP API
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Part of Ngram refactoring series #21052
Following #21425
The single external SAM loaded at startup via --speculative-ngram-external-corpus-path is not flexible enough. Users may want to add/remove corpora at runtime without restarting the server.
Modifications
Multi-SAM storage: Replace s

sglang.title: [CI] Add consistency test in CI
sglang.author: Prozac614
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
CI pipeline lacks strict accuracy checkpoints (guardrails). This risks accidentally merging PRs that cause precision degradation or model performance regression.
Modifications


New Workflow: Added a workflow to generate diffusers ground truth and upload it to the sgl-test-files repositor

sglang.title: Cache sub-objects in __getitem__ to ensure identity stability
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Cache sub-objects returned by GenerateReqInput.__getitem__ and EmbeddingReqInput.__getitem__ so that repeated obj[i] calls return the same instance.
This avoids subtle bugs where different call sites get divergent objects that can fall out of sync.

Test plan

 Run existing unit tests
 Veri

vllm.title: [Gemma4] Enable Fast Prefill Optimization
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add --kv-sharing-fast-prefill support for Gemma 4 models, porting the YOCO (You Only Cache Once) fast prefill optimization from Gemma3n. When enabled, the cross-decoder layers (KV-shared) skip prefill tokens and only process decode tokens, significantly reducing prefill latency and improving

vllm.title: [Models][GDN] Remove GPU/CPU syncs in `GDNAttentionMetadata.build` during speculative decoding
vllm.author: lgeiger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR switches to CPU boolean masks and fixes the output_size in repeat_interleave  to remove GPU/CPU syncs in GDNAttentionMetadata.build during speculative decoding. Indexing with a boolean mask on GPU can't be done asynchronously. Since pytorch/pytorch#156384 if the boolean mask is on CP

PyTorch 2.12+ no longer runs pre-grad passes before the cache lookup

_recursive_pre_grad_passes is no longer needed. Removing it re-enables

Only float32 is known to have no accuracy issues by default.

vllm.title: [MRV2] Fix hanging issue with DeepSeek V3.2 by setting `skip_attn=False`
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: MRV2 was skipping attention metadata preparation during the DP dummy run, which caused the process to hang when running DeepSeek V3.2. This is fixed by defaulting skip_attn to False, ensuring attention metadata is always prepared.

vllm.title: [Attention][MLA] Re-enable FA4 as default MLA prefill backend
vllm.author: MatthewBonanni
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reverts #38562
NaN issue resulting in correctness problems for MLA models #36763 has been resolved by updating FA4 (#38690) to capture the upstream fix Dao-AILab/flash-attention@0293155
This PR makes FA4 the default again due to its superior performance (see benchmarks in #34732)

vllm.title: [BugFix][MRV2] Fix cuda event reuse race
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In Model Runner V2, we have been reusing a single cuda event between successive steps for signaling completion of output token d->h copy. The motivation is that there's a small cost to creating/destroying cuda events.
However, this results in a race condition where we could record the event for step

vllm.title: [Kernels][MoE] Fix legacy_routing to use bitmatrix-based routing path
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Three issues prevented test_gpt_oss_triton_kernels and GPQA serving from working on gfx950 (CDNA4) after the legacy routing deprecation:


pack_bitmatrix sets bit 31 spuriously on HIP: Triton on HIP uses C-style integer division: -1 // 32 == 0 (not -1 as in Python). The masked-out lanes loaded with

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix test repo-root assumptions
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Removes a runtime assumption in several integration scripts that the test container is always a live Git checkout with .git metadata. There are several NIXL/EC integration scripts used git rev-parse --show-toplevel to find the repo root. That is not safe in the ROCm CI image, which copies the worksp
